summary: Frontend testing of new MetricDetail pages feature complete. All 10 metric detail pages (gross_margin, net_margin, ebitda_margin, operating_margin, roic, roe, roa, current_ratio, debt_to_equity, interest_coverage) are working correctly with interactive sections, evaluation ranges with colors, best/worst performers by industry, and expert quotes.

metrics_tested: interest_coverage - Cobertura de Intereses (Current: 999.00x, Status: Excelente >10x)

sections_tested: Relevancia - Shows when/why to use metric
Fórmula - Shows visual formula with numerator/denominator and variables list
Métricas relacionadas - Shows related metrics with clickable navigation

evaluation_section.description: Color-coded evaluation levels (Excelente/blue, Bueno/green, Aceptable/yellow, Bajo/orange, Crítico/red) with range descriptions. Automatically highlights current evaluation based on metric value.

best_worst_performers.description: Tab-based Best/Worst Performers section showing typical ranges per industry (Software, Farmacéutica, Tecnología, Retail, etc.) with industry icons

metric_card_hover_button.description: ExternalLink button on MetricCards has correct hover functionality with opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 classes. 10 metrics have detail page buttons.

navigation.description: Route /metrics/:metricId correctly loads MetricDetail page. 'Volver a métricas' button navigates back to FinancialMetrics. Related metrics navigation works.

current_value_integration.description: MetricDetail pages fetch and display current period metric values from API (/financial-statements/metrics/{period})

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all metric detail pages and interactive features working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing financial data (2024-03 period)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New MetricDetail page (/metrics/:metricId) fully functional. All 10 metrics have comprehensive detail pages with definitions, formulas, evaluations, best/worst performers, and expert quotes. FinancialMetrics.js MetricCard component has hover button that navigates to detail pages. No issues found.
